locations.name: 阿波火山
locations.summary: 阿波火山（他加祿語：Bundok Apo）是一座位于菲律宾棉兰老岛东南部的活火山，海拔2,954公尺，为菲律宾最高峰。达沃市位于其东北方30公里处。近百年未喷发，有硫磺矿，覆盖着热带硬木林。 主峰及周围已经开辟为阿波火山国家公园（面积80…

relations.subject: Mindanao cuckooshrike
relations.evidence: Occurs in a few protected areas in Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol and Samar Island Natural Park in Samar, Pasonanca Natural Park and Mount Apo on Mindanao but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

relations.subject: Mindanao cuckooshrike
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lownland and montane forests up to 2,000 meters above sea level
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Mindanao cuckooshrike
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
